branding.title: Branding & Identity
branding.description: Set your application's visual identity — logo, name, and all metadata used across web, mobile, and social platforms.

incomplete.detail: Please fill in all required fields before continuing.

invalidFavicon.detail: The favicon must be a square image (equal width and height).

invalidFileType.detail: Only HTML, TXT, and DOCX files are accepted. PDF files are not allowed.

components.title: Platform Components
components.hint: Choose which products you want generated, and how many of each
components.error: Select at least one platform component.
components.help: Click a card to add it to your platform, then use +/− to set how many you need

mobile-app.label: Mobile Application
mobile-app.description: A native/cross-platform app for end users on iOS and Android.

landing-page.label: Landing Page
landing-page.description: A public marketing page that introduces your product to visitors.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.description: An admin/management web console for your internal team.

languages.title: App Languages
languages.hint: Choose which language(s) the generated app ships with
languages.minHint: At least one language must stay selected

showName.label: Show name next to logo
showName.hint: Display the app name in the sidebar header alongside the logo

metaDescription.label: Meta Description
metaDescription.placeholder: Brief description of your application for search results...

copyright.label: Copyright Text
copyright.placeholder: e.g. © 2025 Acme Corp. All rights reserved.

authorUrl.label: Author Link
authorUrl.hint: Turns the author/company name in the footer copyright into a clickable link

privacyPolicy.label: Privacy Policy Document
privacyPolicy.acceptedHint: Accepted formats: HTML, TXT, DOCX — one file per language

terms.label: Terms of Service Document
terms.acceptedHint: Accepted formats: HTML, TXT, DOCX — one file per language

social.title: Open Graph (Social Preview)
social.hint: How your app looks when shared on social media

siteUrl.label: Website URL
siteUrl.hint: Shown as the domain in the social preview below

ogTitle.label: OG Title
ogTitle.placeholder: Leave blank to use App Name

ogDescription.label: OG Description
ogDescription.placeholder: Leave blank to use Meta Description

socialLinks.label: Social Links
socialLinks.hint: Leave a platform blank to omit it from the generated app

shortName.label: Short Name
shortName.hint: Used as the app label when installed on a device home screen (keep under 12 characters)
